name: Divine Dragon Aquabizarre
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アクアバザル
desc: Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 other face-up WATER monster and select 1 Continuous or Field Spell Card in your Graveyard to return it to the top of your Deck.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 other face-up WATER monster and select 1 Continuous or Field Spell Card in your Graveyard to return it to the top of your Deck.
eff: Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 other face-up WATER monster and select 1 Continuous or Field Spell Card in your Graveyard to return it to the top of your Deck.

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
